testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-001: Suche per patient-Referenz / GET /Consent?patient=Patient/test-patient-001
TC-SEARCH-002: Suche per status=active / GET /Consent?patient=Patient/test-patient-001&status=active

testcase.name: Genau 1 Treffer – aktiver Consent für Patient 001

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-003: Negativtest – unbekannter Patient / GET /Consent?patient=Patient/nicht-vorhandener-patient-999

testcase.name: HTTP 200 OK – FHIR-Suche gibt nie 404 zurück

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-004: Suche per category (LOINC 57016-8) / GET /Consent?category=http://loinc.org|57016-8

testcase.name: Alle 5 Fixtures werden gefunden (alle haben LOINC 57016-8)
Jeder zurückgelieferte Consent hat category LOINC 57016-8

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-005: Datumsbereichssuche (date ge/le) / GET /Consent?date=ge2023-01-01&date=le2024-12-31

testcase.name: Kein zurückgelieferter Consent hat dateTime vor 2023

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-005: Datumsbereichssuche (date ge/le) / GET /Consent?date=lt2020-01-01 (nur historischer Consent)
TC-SEARCH-006: Suche per status=inactive / GET /Consent?status=inactive
TC-SEARCH-007: Kombinierte Suche (patient + status) / GET /Consent?patient=Patient/test-patient-002&status=inactive
TC-SEARCH-007: Kombinierte Suche (patient + status) / GET /Consent?status=active (4 aktive Consents)

testcase.name: Genau 4 aktive Consents (erteilt, teilweise, expired, mit-actor)
Kein zurückgelieferter Consent hat status != active

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-008: Paginierung (_count) / GET /Consent?_count=2
TC-SEARCH-009: MII SearchParameter – policyUri / GET /Consent?mii-policy-uri=urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.3.1937.777.24.2.1791

testcase.name: Jeder Entry hat die gesuchte policy.uri

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-010: MII SearchParameter – provisionCode (BIOMAT erheben) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code=urn:oid:...|...3.19

testcase.name: 4 Consents haben BIOMAT-erheben-Provision (expired nicht)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-010: MII SearchParameter – provisionCode (BIOMAT erheben) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code=urn:oid:...|...3.19. Test description: 4 Consents haben BIOMAT-erheben-Provision (expired nicht). Error message: expected 5 to equal 4. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 5 to equal 4 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:12).

testcase.name: Kein Entry ist mii-consent-expired-001
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-010: MII SearchParameter – provisionCode (BIOMAT erheben) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code=urn:oid:...|...3.19. Test description: Kein Entry ist mii-consent-expired-001. Error message: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-expired-001'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-expired-001' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:12).

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-011: MII SearchParameter – provisionPeriod (ge2030) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-period=ge2030-01-01

testcase.name: 4 Consents haben Provisions die über 2030 hinausgehen (expired nicht)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-011: MII SearchParameter – provisionPeriod (ge2030) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-period=ge2030-01-01. Test description: 4 Consents haben Provisions die über 2030 hinausgehen (expired nicht). Error message: expected 5 to equal 4. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 5 to equal 4 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:13).

testcase.name: Kein Entry ist mii-consent-expired-001
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-011: MII SearchParameter – provisionPeriod (ge2030) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-period=ge2030-01-01. Test description: Kein Entry ist mii-consent-expired-001. Error message: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-expired-001'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-expired-001' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:13).

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-012: MII SearchParameter – provisionType (deny) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-type=deny

testcase.name: 2 Consents haben deny-Provisions (widerrufen + teilweise)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-012: MII SearchParameter – provisionType (deny) / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-type=deny. Test description: 2 Consents haben deny-Provisions (widerrufen + teilweise). Error message: expected 5 to equal 2. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 5 to equal 2 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:14).

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-013: MII Composite SearchParameter – provisionCodePeriod / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code-period=...20$ge2054-01-01

testcase.name: 2 Consents haben BIOMAT lagern mit Periode bis 2054 (erteilt + widerrufen)
Erwartete IDs sind enthalten (nicht teilweise, nicht expired)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-013: MII Composite SearchParameter – provisionCodePeriod / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code-period=...20$ge2054-01-01. Test description: Erwartete IDs sind enthalten (nicht teilweise, nicht expired). Error message: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-teilweise-erteilt-001'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-teilweise-erteilt-001' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:15).

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-014: MII Composite SearchParameter – provisionCodeType / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code-type=...19$deny

testcase.name: 2 Consents haben BIOMAT erheben mit type=deny (widerrufen + teilweise)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-014: MII Composite SearchParameter – provisionCodeType / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code-type=...19$deny. Test description: 2 Consents haben BIOMAT erheben mit type=deny (widerrufen + teilweise). Error message: expected 5 to equal 2. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 5 to equal 2 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:16).

testcase.name: Erwartete IDs sind enthalten (nicht erteilt, nicht expired)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 1d3a9b85-606d-4b2a-8913-0f53384fddac. Collection name: FHIR Consent – Search Parameter Tests. Request name: TC-SEARCH-014: MII Composite SearchParameter – provisionCodeType / GET /Consent?mii-provision-provision-code-type=...19$deny. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ …(5) ] to not include 'mii-consent-broad-erteilt-001' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:16).

testsuite.name: TC-SEARCH-015: actor-Suche (provision.actor) / GET /Consent?actor=Organization/forschungszentrum-berlin
TC-SEARCH-015: actor-Suche (provision.actor) / GET /Consent?actor=Organization/unbekannt-999 (Negativtest)
TC-SEARCH-016: _include=Consent:patient / GET /Consent?patient=Patient/test-patient-001&_include=Consent:patient
